suspicious_activity.narrative: Cindy Clayton, DOB 1961-08-31, residing at 08330 Robert Stravenue, Garciaberg, AL, engaged in suspicious structuring activities from 2025-02-05 to 2025-08-02. Multiple ATM withdrawals and deposits were made just below $10,000, including $7,491.44 on 2025-07-31 and $6,933.66 on 2025-08-02, across various branches. These transactions are inconsistent with her occupation as an applications developer and reported annual income of $163,820. The rapid movement of funds and high-risk rating further support the suspicion. Accounts involved: CUST_0057_ACC_1, CUST_0057_ACC_2, and CUST_0057_ACC_3. Filing under 31 CFR 1020.320 and 12 CFR 21.11.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: Numerous transactions just below $10,000, rapid movement of funds, high-risk rating, and transaction amounts inconsistent with occupation and income.
